repair_plan.repaired_text_preview:
# group_communication scenario skeleton

side blue display_name Blue

location detector_site
  kind point
  position 30.67n 104.07e
end_location

location relay_site
  kind point
  position 30.70n 104.10e
end_location

location observer_site
  kind point
  position 30.73n 104.13e
end_location

network group_broadcast
  group_join
  internal_link
end_network

platform_type PT_OBSERVER_UNIT
  platform WSF_PLATFORM
  comm group_network WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
end_comm

platform_type PT_RELAY_UNIT
  platform WSF_PLATFORM
  comm group_network WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
end_comm

platform_type PT_DETECTOR_UNIT
  platform WSF_PLATFORM
  processor report_processor WSF_TRACK_PROCESSOR
  comm group_network WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
end_comm

comm_network share_group_net
  network_type WSF_COMM_NETWORK_AD_HOC
  link_frequency 3000 MHz
  bandwidth 1 MHz
  range 50 km
end_comm_network

platform detector_unit
  platform_type PT_DETECTOR_UNIT
  side blue
  position 30.67n 104.07e
  component group_network
  component report_processor
end_platform_type

add transceiver dtx WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
  network share_group_net
end_transceiver
add track_manager dtm WSF_TRACK_MANAGER
  track_transmitter share_group_net
  track_receiver share_group_net
end_track_manager

platform relay_unit PT_RELAY_UNIT
  side blue
  position 30.70n 104.10e
  comm group_network
end_comm

add transceiver rtx WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
  network share_group_net
end_transceiver
add track_manager rtm WSF_TRACK_MANAGER
  track_transmitter share_group_net
  track_receiver share_group_net
end_track_manager

platform observer_unit
  side blue
  platform_type PT_OBSERVER_UNIT
  position 30.73n 104.13e
  comm group_network
end_comm

add transceiver otx WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
  network share_group_net
end_transceiver
add track_manager otm WSF_TRACK_MANAGER
  track_transmitter share_group_net
  track_receiver share_group_net
end_track_manager

group report_sharing_group
  members detector_unit relay_unit observer_unit
end_group

task share_group_reports
  task_type group_communication
  assigned_to report_sharing_group
  parameter message_flow group_broadcast
end_task

event_pipe group_event_pipe
  event group_message_exchange
  forward_to event_output
end_event_pipe

event_output my_output
  format json
  file group_msg.json
end_event_output

end_platform_type
end_platform
end_processor
end_network
end_time 240 sec

repaired_text:
side blue display_name Blue

location detector_site
  kind point
  position 30.67n 104.07e
end_location

location relay_site
  kind point
  position 30.70n 104.10e
end_location

location observer_site
  kind point
  position 30.73n 104.13e
end_location

group report_group WSF_GROUP
end_group

comm group_network WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
end_comm

processor report_processor WSF_TRACK_PROCESSOR
  report_interval 2 sec
  update_interval 10 sec
end_processor

platform_type PT_OBSERVER_UNIT WSF_PLATFORM
  comm group_network
end_platform_type

platform_type PT_RELAY_UNIT WSF_PLATFORM
  comm group_network
end_platform_type

platform_type PT_DETECTOR_UNIT WSF_PLATFORM
  comm group_network
  processor report_processor
end_platform_type

platform detector_unit PT_DETECTOR_UNIT
  side blue
  position 30.67n 104.07e altitude 0 ft msl
  group report_group
end_platform

platform relay_unit PT_RELAY_UNIT
  side blue
  position 30.70n 104.10e altitude 0 ft msl
  group report_group
end_platform

platform observer_unit PT_OBSERVER_UNIT
  side blue
  position 30.73n 104.13e altitude 0 ft msl
  group report_group
end_platform

event_pipe group_event_pipe
  file output/group_comm_example.aer
end_event_pipe

event_output group_output
  file output/group_comm_example.evt
end_event_output

end_time 240 sec

findings.message: end_time must appear at top level, not inside another block
